title: dendrochilum corrugatum
intro: Dendrochilum corrugatum, a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia, is a terrestrial plant characterized by its corrugated leaves and yellowish-green flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dendrochilum corrugatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to release their medicinal properties.
